name: Mango Yogurt Parfait
recipeInstructions:
1. Layer the cubed mango pieces and vanilla low-fat yogurt into parfait glasses.
2. Serve with a long spoon.
3. Garnish with a mango cube and a sprig of mint.
Nutritional analysis per serving: 158.9 calories; 1.6 grams total fat; (1.0 grams saturated fat); 0.7 grams protein; 22.1 grams carbohydrates; 6.5 milligrams cholesterol; 82.6 milligrams sodium.
